title: Evangelion Maid Caf Event Opens in Akihabara
display_title: Evangelion Maid Caf Event Opens in Akihabara
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Maid Café Event Opens in Akihabara             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jul 01, 2009 9:32 pm Sankaku Complex wrote: Readers in the vicinity of Akihabara would likely be interested in noting that over the next month the CURE maid café will be in its new Evangelion mode, to go along with the new release of the Evangelion : 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance movie. This was the same café that recently held its Fate/stay Night event, and so this means a new menu of Eva-influenced dishes and drinks, along with the appropriate decorations to the interior. This particular café, one of the earliest and best known progenitors of the maid café concept, constantly remodels itself to fit a specific series (several past events are covered in the maid café tag), so the particulars of this newest Eva event should be not be surprising.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 01, 2009 9:37 pm This is getting out of control..First a cult now this ;

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Jul 01, 2009 9:39 pm that would be a great compliment to an evening out to see 2.0, albeit a li'l odd

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 01, 2009 9:48 pm There already WAS a maid cafe for 1.0...but it's kinda nice to see they're doing it again. Neat.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Wed Jul 01, 2009 10:21 pm It runs through the 26th... which means I'll be in Tokyo before it ends. Hmm.

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Thu Jul 02, 2009 6:03 am drinian wrote: It runs through the 26th... which means I'll be in Tokyo before it ends. Hmm.

[]: Re: Evangelion Maid Café Event Opens in Akihabara             Quote Post by DIDDY » Thu Jul 02, 2009 4:26 pm NAveryW wrote: ...as well as all kinds of NSFW images on the side bar.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Jul 02, 2009 10:46 pm Orphan Of Darkness wrote: drinian wrote: It runs through the 26th... which means I'll be in Tokyo before it ends. Hmm.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Mon Jul 06, 2009 4:22 am i would like that school dress that's on the wall for my girlfriend... ok, i admit it, my girlfriend wears it but it's for me...

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jul 06, 2009 6:52 am More yummy food! I actually don't know if it's from the same club. But at least the food itself doesn't make up the look of the character...

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Jul 06, 2009 9:53 am I could use some "Ritsuko's Coffee" right now. Especially in such a spiffy mug.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jul 06, 2009 1:56 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: More yummy food! I actually don't know if it's from the same club. But at least the food itself doesn't make up the look of the character...

This was the same café that recently held its Fate/stay Night
